title: Biomes Extra!
description: Adds more biomes to your Minecraft!
body:
**This project is archived and will no longer be receiving updates**

Biomes Extra!

Biomes Extra! adds new biomes and blocks!

  The features in this project are new biomes, with their own blocks, tools, structures, and more This will make the game feel more new with extra biomes to explore!  

Credits:

Music(legacy credits for v0.1.0):

Song: Lost Identities x Robbie Rosen - Moments (Acoustic Version) [NCS Release] Music provided by NoCopyrightSounds Free Download/Stream: http://ncs.io/MomentsAcoustic Watch: http://youtu.be/
